summary: Tested landing page (ConnectPage), onboarding checklist logic, empty states, and backend /api/onboarding-complete endpoint. All major features working. 5/5 backend tests pass. Landing page renders beautifully with all required sections. Empty states and Review Mode 'All caught up' verified. Onboarding checklist code reviewed and logic correct (only shows for 0-deal users with incomplete onboarding).

design_issues.screen: Landing page HOW IT WORKS section label
issues: Label text says 'HOW IT WORKS' but section heading prop text says 'How it works' - minor inconsistency but acceptable as label is styled separately in monospace uppercase

critical_code_review_comments: OnboardingChecklist auto-triggers sync on mount (useEffect with empty deps) which could cause unwanted sync call on every render if component is remounted. Low risk since checklist only shows once.
fund_settings.json is file-backed (not DB) - will be lost on server restart in production. Acceptable for MVP.
seed_data_creation: Reset onboarding_complete flag in fund_settings.json for test user (restored after testing via POST /api/onboarding-complete)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page at root URL (unauthenticated) fully working with all sections: hero, FREE BETA banner, HOW IT WORKS (3 cards), FEATURES (6 cards), footer. All CTA buttons navigate to /api/auth/google. Onboarding checklist (OnboardingChecklist.jsx) is embedded in Dashboard — only shows when deals.length===0 AND fundSettings.onboarding_complete is falsy. Test user has 4 deals so checklist doesn't trigger. Empty states verified: filter empty + Review Mode 'All caught up'. Backend /api/onboarding-complete (POST) returns {ok:true} and persists flag to fund_settings.json.
